fields.summary: Redundant QueuePath usage in UserGroupMappingPlacementRule and AppNameMappingPlacementRule

issuetype.description: A task that needs to be done.
issuetype.name: Task

fields.description: We use the QueuePath and QueueMapping (or QueueMappingEntity) objects in the aforementioned classes, but these technically store the same kind of information, yet we keep converting between them, let's examine if we can use only the QueueMapping(Entity) instead, since that holds more information.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A task that needs to be done.
issuetype.name: Task
